name: /standards-monitor surfaces a fetched-source diff into the standards/decisions.jsonl queue when new content present
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro standards && printf 'sources: [{id: owasp-asvs}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-monitor.sh" --watch --once --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --fetcher-stub new-content --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"source":"owasp-asvs"' standards/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"awaiting_decision":true' standards/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
